debug_info.goal:
k n : ℕ
⊢ ↑(n.choose k) ≤ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ∧ ↑n ^ k / ↑k.factorial ≤ ↑n ^ k / 2 ^ (k - 1)

failed_attempts:
constructor
  · rw [le_div_iff (by exact_mod_cast Nat.factorial_pos k)]
    norm_cast
    rw [mul_comm, Nat.choose_mul_factorial_self n k]
    exact Nat.descFactorial_le_pow n k
  · refine div_le_div_of_nonneg_left (pow_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg n) k) (by positivity) ?_
    norm_cast
    exact Nat.two_pow_sub_one_le_factorial k

simp
      · induction' k with k ih
        · simp
        · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, pow_succ]
          exact (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 ih).trans (Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ (by omega))

simp
    · induction' k with k ih
      · simp
      · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.pow_succ]
        exact Nat.mul_le_mul (Nat.le_add_left 2 k) ih

succ k =>

          exact Nat.mul_le_mul (Nat.le_add_left 2 k) ih

simp

        · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, pow_succ]
          exact Nat.mul_le_mul (Nat.le_add_left 2 k) ih)

simp

          · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.succ_sub_one, mul_comm (k + 2)]

succ k =>

      | succ k ih =>

        exact Nat.mul_le_mul ih (Nat.le_add_left 2 k)

simp

      | zero => simp
      | succ d hd =>

        apply Nat.mul_le_mul (Nat.le_add_left 2 d) hd

simp

succ k ih =>

simp

      · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.succ_sub_one, pow_succ, ← Nat.succ_sub_one]

simp

simp
